title: Small Totem Pop Animation
description: Makes the Totem Pop Animation not take up your whole screen!
body:
Makes the Totem Pop Animation not take up your whole screen!
You can now actually see what you're doing when the totem pop animation plays.

**Preview:**
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f298f26516ff3252b6f482f66d0ce89eb1a30982.png)

This is useful for PvP and many other things, as it frees up a ton of screen space!
